title: openclaw-gateway crash logs 2026-05-11
lastMessage:

2026-05-11T11:42:11Z [info]  loaded config for gateway listeners and bridge routes
2026-05-11T11:42:16Z [error] failed to load TLS key pair: open /etc/openclaw/tls/server.key: no such file or directory
2026-05-11T11:42:16Z [fatal] gateway exiting with status 1

title: cert rotation 2026-05-11 changelog
lastMessage: Cert rotation completed 11:18 UTC. Secret renamed from openclaw-tls to openclaw-certs. New mount path: /var/run/openclaw-certs/. Old mount path /etc/openclaw/tls/ removed from all nodes. Deployment manifests not yet updated.

title: frontend banner copy review
lastMessage: Marketing approved the new status page banner. No production incident here.
